base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of skeleton_walk — a character from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Skeleton — 2-frame walk. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Skeleton — 2-frame walk; overworld night enemy; CV1 carryover
